overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic vehicle through a foggy desert highway at night. The car features a prominent red neon dashboard display while navigating toward and passing under a massive futuristic launch tower structure in the distance.

events.description: massive futuristic launch tower structure becomes visible through the fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed (90-110 km/h) along the foggy desert highway, maintaining a steady course

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle interior with glowing red neon HUD displays showing speed and navigation
two-lane asphalt road stretching into the foggy distance with yellow dividing lines
metal highway guardrails running along the right side of the road
desert vegetation including cacti and scrub bushes visible through the fog
massive futuristic launch tower or space elevator structure barely visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving at high speed through a foggy desert highway at night. The red neon dashboard illuminates the interior while the car maintains a steady course along the asphalt road. Sparse desert vegetation and guardrails line the road, and a massive launch tower structure becomes visible through the fog in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp approaching launch facility

events.description: vehicle slows down significantly from 90 km/h to 20 km/h to take the exit ramp
transitions from main highway to desert facility road with abandoned structures visible

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate the highway exit ramp while approaching the massive launch tower facility

entered.detail: curved exit ramp leading off the main highway toward the facility
futuristic illuminated road sign with cyan neon lighting
derelict concrete structure with broken windows alongside the road
tall industrial street lamps illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows dramatically to take a highway exit ramp, transitioning from the main road to a facility access road. The launch tower grows larger and more defined in the center view, while an abandoned building appears on the left and futuristic neon road signs mark the route. The guardrails of the main highway disappear behind as the car navigates the curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing under massive launch tower structure

events.description: vehicle drives directly under the massive launch tower base, temporarily obscuring the sky
vehicle accelerates back to high speed after clearing the tower structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the launch facility area and passing directly under the massive tower structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel base of the launch tower with support structures
tunnel-like underpass beneath the tower with industrial lighting
scattered metal debris and abandoned equipment near the tower
faint lights from distant buildings or facilities visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and passes directly under the massive launch tower, driving through its shadowy base structure. Industrial debris and abandoned equipment litter the sides of the road. After emerging from the underpass, the tower recedes to the left as the car accelerates back to high speed on the open desert road, with distant city lights visible through the fog ahead.

events.description: vehicle slows down significantly approaching a stop sign or intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open desert road before slowing down for an upcoming intersection or turn

entered.detail: ambient orange glow of a distant city or settlement visible on the horizon
road intersection or junction becoming visible ahead
red octagonal stop sign at the roadside indicating an upcoming halt

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle traveling along an open desert road with the launch tower now far behind and barely visible. A distant city glow appears on the horizon, and the car approaches an intersection marked by a stop sign on the right. The vehicle slows down significantly as it nears the junction, with sparse vegetation continuing to line the foggy roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a vehicle as it transitions from a high-speed highway sprint through a foggy desert into a slow approach toward a massive industrial facility. It begins with the car racing along an asphalt road at night, where a red neon dashboard illuminates the interior against a backdrop of sparse vegetation and a distant, looming launch tower. As the vehicle slows dramatically to take a highway exit ramp, the main road and its guardrails recede behind the camera. The scene then shifts toward a facility access road, where the launch tower grows larger and more defined in the center view while an abandoned building and neon road signs emerge from the haze.

The shot follows a continuous journey from the oppressive shadow of a massive industrial structure into the open, foggy expanse of a desert highway. It begins as the vehicle passes directly under the towering base of a launch tower, gliding past industrial debris and abandoned equipment littering the roadside. As the car emerges from the underpass and accelerates, the tower recedes into the distance to the left while the horizon begins to glow with the faint lights of a far-off city. The scene then opens up into a desolate stretch of road where the tower vanishes from view, leaving only sparse vegetation and thick fog. Finally, the vehicle slows significantly as it approaches a roadside stop sign at a lonely desert intersection.
